note: No video bundler configured. Set EXTERNAL_VIDEO_WEBHOOK for production or BUNDLE_PROVIDER=ffmpeg (plus `npm i ffmpeg-static fluent-ffmpeg`) for local dev.
title: The Diary That Outlived Its Author
hook: A birthday gift became a witness to genocide.
script: On June 12, 1942, a thirteen-year-old girl walked into a Dutch bookshop and picked out a small plaid notebook. She had no idea those blank pages would one day sell over 30 million copies. Six days later, her family vanished into a secret annex. Her name was Anne Frank.
